level1_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon calibrates the Mako robotic arm.
The assistant surgeon prepares the patient and surgical drapes with brief pauses in between.
The assistant surgeon intermittently assists the head surgeon and touches the patient with short idle gaps.
The assistant surgeon drills the patient while holding a surgical instrument.
After a brief pause, the assistant surgeon performs suturing on the patient.
The assistant surgeon prepares the patient and manipulates the surgical drape.
Following a long idle period, the assistant surgeon briefly manipulates the patient.

level2_segments.summary: The assistant surgeon performs initial setup by calibrating the robotic arm and preparing the patient with surgical drapes.
The assistant surgeon provides intermittent support to the head surgeon and performs bone drilling.
The assistant surgeon completes the procedure by performing suturing and managing final patient and drape adjustments.

level1_segments.summary: The circulator nurse briefly assists the scrub nurse after an initial idle period.
The circulator nurse assists the scrub nurse and holds instruments, interspersed with short pauses.
The circulator nurse assists the assistant surgeon and briefly holds an instrument before a long pause.
The circulator nurse prepares the patient and then assists the head surgeon.
After a long idle period, the circulator nurse holds an instrument and manipulates the C-arm.

level2_segments.summary: The circulator nurse provides initial support to the scrub nurse by holding instruments and assisting with setup.
The circulator nurse shifts focus to assist the assistant surgeon and prepares the patient before supporting the head surgeon.
Following a long idle period, the circulator nurse manages instrument handling and operates the C-arm for imaging.

level1_segments.summary: The head surgeon prepares the patient and performs drilling and tissue manipulation using surgical instruments.
The head surgeon calibrates and manipulates the Mako robotic arm to perform bone sawing on the patient.

level2_segments.summary: The head surgeon performs patient preparation, robot-assisted bone sawing, and manual drilling to prepare the surgical site.

level1_segments.summary: The surgical instrument is initially held by the robot technician.
The instrument is passed between the circulator and scrub nurses for preparation and handling.
The scrub nurse holds the instrument for an extended period.
The instrument is briefly held by the assistant surgeon before being returned to the scrub nurse.
The head surgeon takes possession of the instrument and uses it, with brief interactions involving the scrub nurse and assistant surgeon.
The instrument is transferred back to the scrub nurse and then briefly returned to the head surgeon before being held by the scrub nurse again.
The assistant surgeon briefly holds the instrument.
The scrub nurse handles the instrument before it is finally held by the circulator nurse.

level2_segments.summary: The surgical instrument undergoes initial handling, preparation, and extended holding by the nursing staff before clinical use.
The instrument is actively utilized by the surgical team, primarily by the head surgeon, with brief exchanges involving the assistant and scrub nurse.
The instrument is returned to the nursing staff for final handling and transfer to the circulator, concluding its active role in the procedure.

level1_segments.summary: The scrub nurse briefly holds a surgical instrument after an initial idle period.
The scrub nurse engages in an extended session of preparing the instrument table with brief pauses and instrument handling.
The scrub nurse holds a surgical instrument while manipulating the Mako robotic arm.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table following a long idle period.
The scrub nurse alternates between holding surgical instruments and preparing the instrument table.
The scrub nurse touches the operating table and prepares the patient, including draping.
The scrub nurse assists the surgical team by preparing instruments, holding tools, and interacting with the patient and surgeons.
The scrub nurse prepares the instrument table and assists both the head and assistant surgeons with patient contact.
The scrub nurse engages in a prolonged period of preparing the instrument table with a brief pause in between.
The scrub nurse touches the patient, pauses, and then holds an instrument while preparing the table.

level2_segments.summary: The scrub nurse performs initial instrument handling and an extended session of preparing the instrument table.
The nurse supports the robotic arm manipulation and continues to prepare the instrument table while holding surgical tools.
The scrub nurse focuses on patient preparation, draping, and assisting the surgical team with direct patient contact.
The nurse engages in a prolonged period of instrument table preparation interspersed with patient interaction and tool handling.

level1_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive pre-surgery calibration sequence including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle checks before confirming readiness.
The surgeon performs detailed bone registration for the femur and tibia, capturing specific anatomical landmarks such as distal, posterior, anterior, and bevel surfaces.
The robotic system initiates a new phase or procedure start following the completion of bone registration.

level2_segments.summary: The robotic system completes its pre-surgery calibration and the surgeon performs detailed bone registration for the femur and tibia.
The robotic system initiates the next phase of the procedure following the completion of bone registration.

level1_segments.summary: The robot is powered on to begin the setup process.
Initial calibration of the robot is performed by the MPS.
The robot is dressed for sterility, followed by the installation and removal of calibration arrays and the final attachment of the saw tip.

level2_segments.summary: The robot undergoes a complete setup process including power-on, initial calibration, and sterile preparation with tool attachment.
